+## 🔥 Wk15 INSIGHTS
+- **97 leads → 1 conversion** (1.0%) — still stuck at ~1%. 100% organic (ads $0). Q gap blocking conversion.
+- Lead composition: S1=86, S3=8, S2=2, E3=1 (only 1 converted from S1).

+## 🔥 COHORT CLIFF MODEL CORRECTION (Wk15)
+My previous churn model was way too aggressive. Actual vs predicted:
+| Tenure | Model % | Actual Wk15 | Truth |
+|--------|---------|-------------|-------|
+| 30d | 16% | 1.7% (3/175) | **~2%** |
+| 60d | 10% | 8.4% (11/131) | **~8%** |
+| 90d | 5% | 1/148 = 0.7% | **~1%** |
+
+**Real steady-state churn: ~15-20 cancels/week** NOT 35-50. Cash is more resilient than I thought.
+
+Churn insight: 30d cliff customers rarely cancel (still in honeymoon). 60d cliff is the real churn peak when Q-gap becomes obvious. 90d survivors are sticky.
